scripts.adb: adb reverse tcp:9090 tcp:9090 && adb reverse tcp:3000 tcp:3000 && adb reverse tcp:9001 tcp:9001 && adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081
scripts.start: source env.sh && yarn test && export APP_VARIANT='development' && expo start --dev-client
scripts.start:skip: source env.sh && export APP_VARIANT='development' && expo start --dev-client
scripts.build:android-dev: yarn test && ./scripts/check_build_size android && source env.sh && export NODE_ENV='development' && eas build --profile development --platform android --local
scripts.build:android-preview: yarn test && ./scripts/check_build_size android && ./scripts/updateAndroidVersionCode && eas build --profile preview --platform android
scripts.build:android-production: yarn test && ./scripts/check_build_size android && ./scripts/updateAndroidVersionCode && eas build --profile production --platform android
scripts.build:ios-dev: source env.sh && yarn test && ./scripts/check_build_size ios && export APP_VARIANT='development' && eas build --profile development-simulator --platform ios --local
scripts.build:ios-preview: yarn test && ./scripts/check_build_size ios && eas build --profile preview --platform ios
scripts.build:ios-production: source env.sh && yarn test && ./scripts/check_build_size ios && ./scripts/update_ios_build_number && eas build --profile production --platform ios
scripts.updateGoogleServicesJson: eas secret:create --scope project --name GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON --type file --value googleServices/google-services.json
scripts.updateGoogleServicesPlist: eas secret:create --scope project --name GOOGLE_SERVICES_PLIST --type file --value googleServices/GoogleService-Info.plist
scripts.test-archive-ios: rm -rf ../test_archive && eas build:inspect --platform ios --stage archive --output ../test_archive --profile production
scripts.test-archive-android: rm -rf ../test_archive && eas build:inspect --platform android --stage archive --output ../test_archive --profile production
